$schema: Canonical logo registry for the SkyyRose imagery pipeline. Logos live in assets/images/logos/ and are referenced by id. Every SKU's logo placements are defined here, cross-checked with skyyrose-catalog.csv::branding_spec during pre-flight. Edit both files together when adding a logo or reassigning placements.

sr-monogram-rose-gold.description: Primary SkyyRose 'SR' monogram in rose gold metallic finish, paired with a stylized rose on the right. Used on Black Rose collection and Kids Capsule.

sr-monogram-gold.description: SkyyRose 'SR' monogram in warm gold finish. Used on the Signature collection as the premium colorway.

rose-gold-rose.description: Standalone stylized rose in rose gold metallic. EXCLUSIVELY used on sg-015 The Windbreaker Set (per user clarification 2026-04-20). Not a general-purpose rose element — do NOT reuse on other SKUs without explicit user sign-off.

black-roses-cloud-cluster.description: Cluster of gray/black roses with green thorns emerging from clouds. 'Black Is Beautiful Series' signature rose imagery — used on NBA/NFL/MLB authentic-collection cards and as embroidered motif on Black Rose jerseys. Rendered in colorway-shifted variants (lavender, blue, purple, red) on collection-specific pieces; recolor is applied at render time, not to the source file.

red-roses-cloud-cluster.description: Cluster of red roses with green thorns emerging from clouds. Love Hurts collection variant of the rose cluster. Used on Love Hurts basketball shorts (all-over + mesh panels) and Signature Sherpa Jacket (red colorway).

heart-rose-composite.description: Red heart wrapped in thorns with roses emerging from the top, blood splatters. The Love Hurts 'heart-and-rose' composite logo — used on Love Hurts Fannie (where dot of the 'i' would go), back of Love Hurts bomber, left-thigh on Love Hurts joggers.

love-hurts-full-lettering.description: Full 'Love Hurts' graffiti lettering with heart+thorns composite integrated. Used as large sublimated element on Love Hurts basketball shorts + Black Rose × Love Hurts shorts, and as front lettering on Love Hurts bomber.

love-lettering.description: Split 'Love' graffiti lettering component of the Love Hurts logo. Available for layouts where Love/Hurts are placed separately.

hurts-lettering.description: Split 'Hurts' graffiti lettering component of the Love Hurts logo. Pairs with love-lettering for split layouts.

nba-authentic-collection-card.description: 'BLACK ROSE NBA AUTHENTIC COLLECTION' card graphic — navy lettering on yellow ground, NBA logo, 'Property Of Black Is Beautiful Series' tagline. Used as custom basketball-style patch on BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series basketball SKUs.

nfl-authentic-collection-card.description: 'BLACK ROSE NFL AUTHENTIC COLLECTION' card graphic — navy lettering on yellow ground, NFL logo, 'Property Of Black Is Beautiful Series' tagline. Used as custom football-style patch (bottom-left corner) on BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series football SKUs.

mlb-authentic-collection-card.description: 'BLACK ROSE MLB AUTHENTIC COLLECTION' card graphic — navy lettering on yellow ground, MLB logo, 'Authentic Collection' banner. Ornate footer with 'Members only — Yay Area, Ca', Skyy Rose Collection script logo with moon, and 'Made for Kings ang Queens' tagline. Used as custom baseball-style patch on BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series baseball SKUs.

skyy-rose-collection-circular-patch.description: 'SKYY ROSE COLLECTION' circular patch — white/gray ground with black 'SKYY ROSE' arched on top + 'COLLECTION' arched on bottom, detailed black rose bouquet emerging from cloud in center. Used on right arm of Kids Capsule hoodie sets.

hockey-championship-card.description: 'BLACK ROSE HOCKEY CHAMPIONSHIP COLLECTION' card graphic — gray/silver ground, navy lettering, hockey shield with crossed sticks + puck. Minimalist design (no 'Property Of' footer). Used as custom hockey-style patch on BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series hockey SKUs (Sharks Edition).

br-003.name: BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series: 0 — Baseball Classic (Black)

placements.notes: Large back logo.
On body side, NOT on arm.

br-006.name: BLACK Rose Sherpa Jacket

placements.notes: Large back version.

br-006.garment_notes: Satin bomber jacket lined with black sherpa, hooded.

br-007.name: BLACK Rose x Love Hurts Basketball Shorts

placements.notes: Large sublimated element.
Smaller Love Hurts + Rose logos stitched on mesh side panels.

br-008.name: BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series: 1 — SF Inspired (Red Football)

placements.notes: Rose cluster fills the '8' digit in jersey number 80 on the front; '0' remains plain white.
Reversed on back — '8' is plain, '0' has the rose cluster fill.

br-009.name: BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series: 2 — Last Oakland (White Football)

placements.notes: Rose cluster fills the '3' digit in jersey number 32 on the front; '2' remains plain white.
Reversed on back — '3' is plain, '2' has the rose cluster fill.

br-010.name: BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series: 3 — The Bay (Basketball)
br-010.notes: User confirmed: vision pipeline produced a good first render — preserve existing spec.

br-011.name: BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series: 4 — The Rose / Sharks Edition (Hockey)

placements.notes: Hockey Championship card — different visual style from NBA/NFL cards (gray ground, shield with sticks+puck, minimalist).

br-011.notes: User confirmed: vision did a good job on the first render of this — preserve existing.

br-012.name: BLACK Is Beautiful Jersey Series: 5 — Last Oakland (Green Button-Front Baseball)
br-012.front_text_notes: 'A' of BLACK in black lettering, remainder of BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL in gold lettering.

placements.notes: Smaller Love Hurts + Rose logos stitched on mesh side panels.
User-confirmed 2026-04-20: Love Hurts graffiti lettering goes on the front.
Inside of hood sublimated with Love Hurts rose cluster (red colorway).
User-confirmed 2026-04-20: heart-and-rose composite centered on back.
Heart and rose logo positioned where the dot of the 'i' in 'Fannie' would go.

sg-001.name: The Bridge Series 'The Bay Bridge' Shorts

placements.notes: Bay Bridge image covers entire shorts. Rose cluster rendered in blue.
Blue embroidered rose cluster on bottom left of shorts.
Rose cluster embroidered on front chest; Golden Gate Bridge imagery incorporated within the rose motif.
Golden Gate Bridge image covers entire shorts. Rose cluster rendered in purple.
Purple embroidered rose cluster on bottom left of shorts.

sg-005.name: The Bridge Series 'The Bay Bridge' Shirt

placements.notes: Rose cluster embroidered on front chest; Bay Bridge imagery incorporated within the rose motif.
Small silicone patch. Rose cluster colorway follows the beanie variant color.

sg-011.name: Original Label Tee (White)
sg-011.notes: Plain tee — no logo placements. Confirmed 2026-04-20.

sg-012.name: Original Label Tee (Orchid)
sg-012.notes: Plain tee — no logo placements. Confirmed 2026-04-20.

placements.notes: Small neck back embroidery.

sg-015.name: The Windbreaker Set
sg-015.notes: rose-gold-rose is the exclusive logo for this SKU. Tech flat at sg-015-windbreaker-set.jpg is wired as render source.

placements.notes: Same placement pattern as kids-001. Awaiting circular patch logo file.

gaps.description: kids-002 right_arm circular patch references NEEDS_SKYY_ROSE_CIRCULAR_PATCH placeholder. Should use skyy-rose-collection-circular-patch once confirmed this is the same patch as kids-001.
